title: Verify loss aversion exit gate displays when user attempts to cancel
description: Test that clicking Cancel Trial triggers the loss aversion intervention with warning about losing remaining free days
preconditions: User is in Trial Corner Manage Trial section

steps.description: 1. Navigate to Trial Corner > Manage Trial

expected_result: Exit gate displays headline 'Wait! Don't lose your free days', body text explaining immediate loss of access, shows remaining days, Primary action is 'Keep Trial & Set Reminder', Secondary action is 'Cancel/Pause Anyway & Lose Access'
